songs.title: Royals
songs.body:
{Verse  1}
[D]

I've  never  seen  a  diamond  in  the  flesh
[D]

I  cut  my  teeth  on  wedding  rings  in  the  movies
[D]

And  I'm  not  proud  of  my  address  -  in  the  torn  up  town

No  postcode  envy
